_comment: Calibration fixture: hand-written answers with KNOWN verdicts, used to prove the scorer works before any agent exists. AAPL revenue = correct but rounded+different unit (tests normalization). AAPL net_income = hallucination. AAPL gross_margin = correct within 0.5pp. MSFT revenue = correct exact. MSFT net_income = missing. MSFT gross_margin = hallucination. Expected: completion 5/6=83.3%, fact_accuracy 3/6=50%, hallucination 2/5=40%.
